patch.value:
## Problem
`pm create ... --ac A --ac B --ac C --ac D` silently stores ONLY D. Same class as pm-cf1u (repeated --tag last-wins) and pm-6mit (repeated --step last-wins), both fixed via the argv-level coalesceRepeatedListFlags mechanism gated by the CliFlagContract `list: true` marker — but `--ac` was never marked, so it still last-wins. For agents this is silent data loss on a governance-required field: three of four criteria vanish with exit 0 and no warning.

## Reproduction (live, 2026-07-07, v2026.7.7)
Creating pm-a9mc with four --ac flags stored only the fourth criterion (visible in the create output and the item's history stream); the criteria had to be re-joined manually via pm update with a single ;-separated string.

## Fix direction
Mark the acceptance-criteria contract flag as list-coalescing and join accumulated values with '; ' (the established storage convention for multi-criterion items, e.g. pm-cfed). Sweep other scalar flags where an agent would plausibly repeat the flag (e.g. --link/--file style inputs) and either mark them or leave them single-value deliberately.

## Non-overlap
pm-cf1u and pm-6mit are closed and their fixes verified for their flag sets; this is the uncovered remainder of that class, reproduced on the current release.
Repeated --ac flags on create/update silently keep only the last acceptance criterion

Repeated --ac occurrences accumulate into the stored acceptance_criteria string (joined with '; ' to match existing workspace convention) on pm create and pm update; a repeated-flag spec covers create+update; remaining scalar-contract flags with plausible repeat intent are checked against the CliFlagContract list marker and either marked list:true or documented as single-value

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Implementation start: selected after live all-status duplicate/lineage review and full metadata inspection. This item is actively implemented in the broad schema-driven input fidelity bundle with pm-kfq5, pm-l6rz, pm-zazb, pm-b84u, and pm-ghf1; shared verification will include focused tests, 100/100/100/100 coverage, strict quality gates, and installed-package temporary-project proof.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Implementation evidence: broad schema-driven input fidelity bundle completed. Focused suite passed 445 tests; final repository coverage passed 270 files / 5514 tests at Statements 100%, Branches 100%, Functions 100%, Lines 100%; pnpm typecheck, lint (ESLint + zero jscpd clones + strict static/docstring/import-boundary/token gates), docs/skills, contracts snapshot, audit, secret scan, health, and history-drift checks passed. Installed-package proof from packed tarball in /tmp/pm-proof.rzTX77 verified repeated --ac stores 'first; second', malformed related:pm-abcd fails before graph mutation, and public SDK RESERVED_ITEM_FIELD_NAMES/lintExtensionBlueprint rejects severity collisions. Sentry telemetry is healthy (0.28% finish error rate); two external pm-starter package handled errors PM-CLI-1Y/1Z remain visible and are not caused by this change set.

patch.value: Implemented and verified in the schema-driven input fidelity SDK/CLI bundle with full 100/100/100/100 coverage and installed-package proof.

author: codex-root
message: Final Greptile follow-up: merge mixed repeatable acceptance-criteria alias keys without changing scalar first-value reads

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Final Greptile evidence: readJoinedRepeatedOption now walks every Commander alias key, accepts scalar or collected string values, merges them in contract order, and rejects any malformed alias payload. Create regression covers canonical scalar + underscore array + short alias array; update covers canonical + short arrays. Focused tests, strict lint/type, and final full 5514-test coverage gate pass at 100/100/100/100.

patch.value: Mixed repeatable acceptance-criteria aliases now merge without data loss; all full gates pass.

author: codex-root
message: Final Gemini follow-up: skip Commander-materialized nullish alias keys while merging repeatable acceptance criteria

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Final Gemini nullish evidence: Commander own alias keys with null/undefined are now skipped exactly like omitted keys before scalar/array validation. Regression includes an own undefined acceptance_criteria key between valid canonical and short-alias arrays. Strict lint/type and final full 5514-test coverage pass at 100/100/100/100.

patch.value: Commander-materialized nullish alias keys no longer discard valid repeatable criteria; full gates pass.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Final Gemini disposition: declined filtering malformed non-string array entries. Nullish Commander aliases are skipped, but other invalid payload shapes deliberately invalidate the acceptance-criteria option so corruption is visible rather than silently hidden; existing regression asserts non-string arrays return undefined.
